quotes:
"Sometimes the best way to solve your own problems is to help someone else." 
- Uncle Iroh 🍵

"Good times become good memories, but bad times become good lessons." 
- Uncle Iroh 🍵

"It is important to draw wisdom from many different places. If you take it from only one place, it becomes rigid and stale." 
- Uncle Iroh 🍵

"To find light one must be in the dark in order to find wisdom." 
- Uncle Iroh 🍵

"It's not about whether I can or not. I'm gonna do it because I want to." 
- Luffy 👒

"There are things that matter more than power." 
- Luffy 👒

"I never give up. I never go back on my word." 
- Narruto 🍥

"Carpe diem. Seize the day, boys." 
- John Keating 🎬

"Do or do not. There is no try." 
- Yoda 🌌

"Just keep swimming." 
- Dory 🐠

"It is fine now. Why? Because I am here!" 
- All Might 💪

"You have to try every time." 
- Zuko 🔥

"Believe you can and you're halfway there." 
- Theodore Roosevelt 🏛️

"Do what you can, with what you have, where you are." 
- Theodore Roosevelt 🏛️

"Dream big and dare to fail." 
- Norman Vaughan 🏔️

"Either write something worth reading or do something worth writing." 
- Benjamin Franklin ⚡

"It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop." 
- Confucius 🧠

"Knowing is not enough; we must apply. Wishing is not enough; we must do." 
- Goethe 📖

"The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus." 
- Bruce Lee 🐉

"Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day-in and day-out." 
- Robert Collier 🧱

"Failing and failing and failing and eventually succeeding." 
- Mark Rober 🧪

"Run toward very hard problems." 
- MrBeast 🎬

"I'm doing it because I want to." 
- Luffy 👒

"If I have to die fighting for that... then I die!" 
- Luffy 👒

"People can say whatever they want about me, but I've never done a single thing in my life that I regret." 
- Zoro ⚔️

"Someone who can't sacrifice anything, can't ever change anything." 
- Armin ⚔️

"If we only focus on making the best moves, we will never get the better of our opponent." 
- Erwin ⚔️

"All men are not created equal." 
- Deku 🦸

"You are in danger of living a life so comfortable and soft, that you will die without ever realizing your true potential." 
- David Goggins 🪖

"No one is going to come help you. No one's coming to save you." 
- David Goggins 🪖

"The most important conversations you'll ever have are the ones you'll have with yourself." 
- David Goggins 🪖

"Denial is the ultimate comfort zone." 
- David Goggins 🪖

"I don't stop when I'm tired. I stop when I'm done." 
- David Goggins 🪖

"When you think that you are done, you're only 40% in." 
- David Goggins 🪖

"Don't fight stress. Embrace it." 
- Jocko Willink 🪓

"When you want to succeed as bad as you want to breathe, then you'll be successful." 
- Eric Thomas 🎤

"Impossible is not a fact. It's an opinion." 
- Muhammad Ali 🥊

"Impossible is temporary. Impossible is nothing." 
- Muhammad Ali 🥊

"The moment you give up, is the moment you let someone else win." 
- Kobe Bryant 🐍

"Everything negative - pressure, challenges - is all an opportunity for me to rise." 
- Kobe Bryant 🐍

"The most important thing is to try and inspire people so that they can be great." 
- Kobe Bryant 🐍

"A painless lesson is one without any meaning." 
- Fullmetal Alchemist ⚙️

"Stop researching every aspect of it. Start doing it." 
- Jocko Willink 🪓

"The test is simple: when the alarm goes off, do you get up?" 
- Jocko Willink 🪓

"Look in the mirror. That's your competition." 
- Eric Thomas 🎤

"Hard work beats talent when talent fails to work hard." 
- Tim Notke 🏀

"Don't count the days, make the days count." 
- Muhammad Ali 🥊

"Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one." 
- Marcus Aurelius 🏛️

"You have power over your mind, not outside events." 
- Marcus Aurelius 🏛

"If it is endurable, then endure it." 
- Marcus Aurelius 🏛️

"We suffer more often in imagination than in reality." 
- Seneca 🏛️

"He who has a why to live can bear almost any how." 
- Friedrich Nietzsche 🧠

"Action is the antidote to despair." 
- Joan Baez 🎵

"Well done is better than well said." 
- Benjamin Franklin ⚡

"Energy and persistence conquer all things." 
- Benjamin Franklin ⚡

"Don't wish it were easier. Wish you were better." 
- Jim Rohn 📈

"You are what you do, not what you say you'll do." 
- Carl Jung 🧠

"The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek." 
- Joseph Campbell 🗺

"A man who conquers himself is greater than one who conquers a thousand men." 
- Buddha 🪷

"I want to be the sort of man people can rely on!" 
- Chopper 🦌
